recommendations.title: Waist Deep
recommendations.overview: An ex-convict gets tangled up with a gang after his car is hijacked with his son inside.

recommendations.title: Gridlock'd
recommendations.overview: After a friend overdoses, Spoon and Stretch decide to kick their drug habits and attempt to enroll in a government detox program. Their efforts are hampered by seemingly endless red tape, as they are shuffled from one office to another while being ch

recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: Limelight
recommendations.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

recommendations.title: The Night House
recommendations.overview: Reeling from the unexpected death of her husband, Beth is left alone in the lakeside home he built for her. Soon she begins to uncover her recently deceased husband's disturbing secrets.

recommendations.title: Crooklyn
recommendations.overview: From Spike Lee comes this vibrant semi-autobiographical portrait of a school-teacher, her stubborn jazz-musician husband and their five kids living in '70s Brooklyn.

recommendations.title: Cymbeline
recommendations.overview: War erupts between dirty cops and outlaw bikers as a drug kingpin tries to protect his empire.

recommendations.title: A Beautiful Life
recommendations.overview: When a young fisherman with a hidden talent gets discovered by a music producer, he must decide if he's ready to open himself up to stardom — and love.

recommendations.title: Black Rain
